title: Berlin Lakes Guide 2026 - Quick Summary
items: Berlin has **39 officially monitored bathing sites** — almost all are free to enter, no booking required.
**Check the official bathing-water status on the day.** Warm late-summer water can bring algae or cercaria issues, and early 2026 reports already appeared at a few lakes.
Most lakes are reachable in **30-45 minutes from Alexanderplatz** on a regular BVG day ticket.
**Schlachtensee** is where locals actually swim. **Strandbad Wannsee** is where the tourists go.
**FKK** (nude bathing) is normalised but never required — most lidos and city lakes default to clothed.
